advancedVocab.dừng tay: to stop (doing something); to cease (an action)
advancedVocab.lời bộc: words of confession; frank words (note: 'bộc' is short for 'bộc bạch', meaning to confide or confess)

vocab.trong phim: in the film; in the movie
vocab.làm ngơ: to ignore; to pretend not to see
vocab.đặt lợi ích của mình lên trên: to put one's own interests first

advancedVocab.bạch tâm sự: reveal one's innermost feelings; confess (formal, literary)
